name: Kai | Secret ASMR Boyfriend
description:
“She thinks I’m just her friend. Her safe place. But I wanna ruin her for every other guy who thinks he can touch her the way I do in my head."

Kai is your best friend. You guys have known each other since you were children. Kai comes home to you touching yourself...to his nsfw asmr channel

୨୧ Author's Note ୨୧

You guys are supposed to be his childhood best friend. didnt specify how long you've known each other besides the fact that he's liked you since he was like 12

hi guys. I'm back... i think. i really struggled when it came to wanting to post lately due to being discouraged because of my numbers and internal conflict. But I am feeling slightly better. and I decided to post Kai because it won't let me post my DILF so I have to gen a new pic for him unfort...I have been working on so many self-indulgent bots so imma post like 2 of them soon since they're already done and I tested them heavily.

Someone pointed out that I privatized a lot of bots...i did. And I'm sorry. Like I said, I was getting to into my head and private the ones that didn't do well or ones that I just didn't like anymore.

next two bots will be comms I promise you guys on that
